profile.name: Rohit Madhukar More
profile.availability: Open to Internships and Backend Development Roles

about: Computer Engineering student and aspiring Backend Developer with hands-on experience in Java, Spring Boot, REST API development, and database-driven applications. I enjoy designing secure backend systems, building full-stack web platforms, and working on real-world projects involving authentication, scalable architectures, and data-driven applications.

details: Developed and tested backend REST APIs using Spring Boot.
Designed MySQL database schemas and implemented CRUD operations.
Implemented authentication and role-based authorization using JWT.
Performed API testing using Postman and validated request/response payloads.
Working on backend architecture and API development for the platform MVP.
Designing database schemas and business logic for decision-support systems.
Contributing to backend services and system architecture design.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Engineering
education.institution: M. H. Saboo Siddik College of Engineering
details: Currently in third year with a CGPA of 8.08
Learning core computer science fundamentals and modern web technologies

projects.title: Movie Recommendation System
projects.description: AI-powered movie recommendation platform using Python and Streamlit that suggests movies based on similarity algorithms and TMDB dataset.

projects.title: NewsYork – News Aggregation Platform
projects.description: News aggregation web platform that fetches real-time news via APIs and supports comments, voting, and bookmarking with a prepared MySQL backend schema.

projects.title: AnchorSpace Social Platform
projects.description: Social networking platform enabling user profiles, posts, and community interaction built using modern web technologies.

projects.title: Student Intelligence Platform
projects.description: Machine learning platform predicting student academic performance using multiple ML models and interactive Streamlit dashboards.

projects.title: Hospital Management System Backend
projects.description: Secure Spring Boot backend implementing REST APIs, JWT authentication, OAuth2 login, and role-based access control for hospital operations.
